name: Local host on Botnet CandC List (SRC)
notes: This rule triggers when a local system is a member of a known botnet CandC.
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
when the source IP is a part of any of the following BOT.BOT_Control
TD_list: APPLY Local host on Botnet CandC List (SRC) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
AND when the source IP is a part of any of the following BOT.BOT_Control
RED_list: Event name: Local host on Botnet CandC List (SRC)
Event description: A local host has been identified on a list of known botnet command and control host.  Host should be investigated.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
